Features.title: Experience, Trust & Care
Features.description: As a family-owned business, we understand what matters most: treating your belongings like our own and making your move as stress-free as possible.

insured.title: Fully Insured Protection
insured.description: Comprehensive Transit and Public Liability insurance on every move. Your peace of mind is our priority.

fees.title: No Hidden Fees
fees.description: What you see is what you pay. Clear, upfront pricing with no surprises on moving day.

tracking.title: Real-Time Tracking

Services.description: Whatever your moving needs, we have the expertise and equipment to handle it with care.

Testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
Testimonials.description: Real feedback from real people. See why families trust us with their moves.

items.text: The team was incredible. They treated our belongings like their own and made our Melbourne to Sydney move completely stress-free. Can't recommend them enough!
items.author: Sarah Johnson

items.text: Professional, friendly, and efficient. The quote was transparent, no hidden costs, and they delivered exactly what they promised. Best moving company we've used.
items.author: Michael Chen

items.text: They handled our office move with such professionalism. Minimal downtime, everything arrived perfectly, and the team was just wonderful to work with.
items.author: Emma Parker

FAQ.title: Your Questions Answered
FAQ.description: Have questions? We have answers. Can't find what you're looking for? Give us a call.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 1-2 weeks in advance, especially during peak periods (end of month and weekends). However, we can often accommodate short-notice and same-week moves across Melbourne — just give us a call!

items.question: What insurance do you provide?
items.answer: All our moves include comprehensive Transit and Public Liability insurance. Coverage is included with every booking, with options for additional protection for high-value items. We're fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind.

items.question: What's included in the hourly rate?
items.answer: Our hourly rate includes a professional crew, the truck, moving blankets & straps, hand trolleys, shrink wrap, mattress protectors, and a hydraulic tailgate. No hidden charges — what we quote is what you pay.

items.question: What items can't you move?
items.answer: For safety and legal reasons, we cannot transport hazardous materials, perishable foods, pets, or illegal items. If you're unsure about a specific item, feel free to ask our team before moving day.

items.question: What are your payment terms?
items.answer: Payment is due upon completion of the move. We accept all major credit cards, bank transfers, and cash. For larger moves, payment plans may be available — contact us to discuss options.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Family-owned. Melbourne-based. Trusted for over 15 years.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: MoverX Solutions is a family-owned and operated removalist company based in Melbourne. Since 2009, we've been helping families, professionals, and businesses move with confidence — delivering precision, care, and discretion on every job.
story.p2: What started as a small family operation has grown into one of Melbourne's most trusted local moving companies. Over 15 years and 6,000+ successful moves later, our commitment remains the same: treat every belonging as if it were our own.
story.p3: We're not a faceless corporation. We're a family serving families — and that personal touch is what sets us apart.

care.title: Care & Precision
care.description: Every item is handled with the same care we'd give our own belongings. Careful packing, secure transport, precise placement.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. We provide clear, upfront pricing so you know exactly what to expect.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: On time, every time. We show up when we say we will and deliver on our promises.

community.title: Community
community.description: We're proud to serve Melbourne and its surrounding suburbs. This is our home, and we treat every client like a neighbour.

house.title: House Moving
house.subtitle: Complete residential moving services
house.description: We provide professional residential moving services designed to make your relocation smooth, secure, and completely stress-free. From careful packing and protected transport to precise unloading and furniture placement, our experienced team manages every detail with care, efficiency, and professionalism — so you can focus on settling into your new home.
features: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
benefits: Reliable, on-time service from start to finish
Peace of mind with insured moves

commercial.title: Commercial Moving
commercial.subtitle: Efficient business relocations
commercial.description: We provide end-to-end commercial moving and logistics support for businesses that require reliability and efficiency. Whether relocating retail spaces, warehouses, or trade operations, our team delivers structured planning, secure handling, and streamlined execution — minimising downtime and protecting your assets every step of the way.
features: Scalable solutions tailored to your needs

office.title: Office Relocation
office.subtitle: Specialized office moving services
office.description: We deliver comprehensive office relocation solutions focused on efficiency, organisation, and business continuity. From initial planning and secure packing to transport, reassembly, and workspace configuration, our experienced team ensures a smooth transition with minimal downtime and maximum productivity.

packing.title: Professional Packing
packing.subtitle: Expert packing for maximum protection
packing.description: Packing is one of the most critical stages of any move. Our professional packing service ensures every item is securely wrapped, protected, and organised using high-quality materials and expert techniques. The result? Safer transport, less stress, and a smoother moving experience from start to finish.
features: Efficient preparation for moves or storage

storage.title: Storage
storage.subtitle: Secure container storage solutions
storage.description: We provide secure and flexible container storage solutions for both residential and commercial clients requiring short or long-term space. Your goods are professionally loaded, sealed, and stored in dedicated containers within our monitored facility, ensuring maximum protection and convenient access whenever needed.
benefits: Peace of mind with secure storage

furniture.title: New Furniture Delivery
furniture.subtitle: Professional furniture delivery and assembly
furniture.description: We partner with furniture stores and suppliers to provide professional delivery and installation services that extend your brand experience beyond the showroom. From warehouse collection to in-home delivery and setup, our trained team ensures safe handling, efficient scheduling, and flawless presentation, enhancing customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.
